codeReview.summary: The fix commit directly addresses the prior failure and the two non-blocking UX items: `/business/profile` is now present in business navigation, custom duration input now writes through to `formData.estimatedDuration`, and edit-flow compensation type initialization no longer forces `paid-hourly`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `fullstack-worker` skill requires running lint in automated verification, but this fix session reports only type-check and build while still marking `followedProcedure: true`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill file `.factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md` (Work Procedure §4) includes `npm run lint`; handoff `2026-04-17T14-46-41-596Z__fix-ux-scrutiny-issues__f297819d-f8c1-44b5-8fc0-91912024e7d6.json` lists only `npm run type-check` and `npm run build` in `verification.commandsRun`.

summary: Pass. The fix adequately resolves the original blocking navigation defect from `ux-navigation-guidance` and implements the scoped non-blocking UX corrections without introducing new blocking issues in the reviewed diffs.
